label: Ethics & Philosophy
vocabulary: social construction of race and gender
the absurd and meaning of life

sources.title: Good Food: Ethics and Politics of Food

app_prompts: Philosophy of mind explainer: user explores dualism vs. physicalism — what each position says about consciousness, the mind-body problem, and what evidence could settle the debate.
Applied ethics case study: user picks a scenario (factory farming, climate change, global poverty, AI development) and works through it using utilitarian, deontological, and virtue ethics frameworks.
Free will and moral responsibility quiz: user reads a scenario and decides: is the person morally responsible? The app traces compatibilist and incompatibilist reasoning through the case.
Epistemology challenge: user picks an everyday belief and traces its justification — what would Descartes, Hume, or Kant say about how you know this? What skeptical challenge can be raised?

Metaethics explainer: user explores whether moral facts are objective or constructed — what moral subjectivism, relativism, and realism each claim, and what the stakes are for everyday moral judgments.
